name: terraform-link-docs
description: Open documentation for Terraform resources, data sources, providers and modules

terraform-link-docs.enableCommunityProvi.description: Enables more accurate link resolution for all providers (including community/3rd-party) by parsing 'required_providers' blocks. If disabled, only HashiCorp-supported providers will be linked correctly.

terraform-link-docs.documentationRegistr.description: Select the documentation registry to use. If 'Custom' is selected, the custom template configurations below will be used.

terraform-link-docs.customProviderDocURL.markdownDescription: Only used if **Custom** Registry Type is selected above. Template URL for provider documentation links. Available placeholders: `{namespace}`, `{providerName}`, `{type}` (resource/data), `{typeSegment}` (resources/data-sources), `{typeSegmentShort}` (r/d), `{name}` (resource name without provider prefix), `{fullName}` (full resource name).

Only used if **Custom** Registry Type is selected above. Fallback template URL for provider documentation links when the provider namespace is unknown (e.g. `required_providers` not found). Available placeholders: `{provider}`, `{type}`, `{typeSegment}`, `{typeSegmentShort}`, `{name}`, `{fullName}`.

terraform-link-docs.customModuleDocURLTe.markdownDescription: Only used if **Custom** Registry Type is selected above. Template URL for public module documentation links. Available placeholders: `{namespace}`, `{name}`, `{provider}`.

terraform-link-docs.customSubModuleDocUR.markdownDescription: Only used if **Custom** Registry Type is selected above. Template URL for public submodule documentation links. Available placeholders: `{namespace}`, `{name}`, `{provider}`, `{submodule}`.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
